title: HIDYKs Creepers+ by Aimee Neilluna
description: An addon for HIDYK's REALM that adds various models for creepers!
body:
An addon for **HIDYK's REALM** that adds various models for creepers!

_The original resourcepack: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hidyksrealm](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hidyksrealm)_

![Creepers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/819766d2592056fbd84699b42438d8912da5a5ee.png)

Terms of use

You are NOT allowed to use this pack for any commercial purposes or put it behind "adf.ly" or similar ad links.

You are NOT allowed to use textures from the resource pack in third-party projects. A lot of effort has been put into it, and I want to preserve the originality of my content.

You are NOT allowed to use textures from this project for training AI
